description: 神盾局特工，曾经的FBI。量子领域归零地黑帮老大——表面是联邦特工执法，实际上是黑道教父。'管这片儿'的执法风格喜感极强。

signatureLines.text: I used to run a chop shop in Oakland.
I am actually the leader of something called the PAMSI group, which stands for something.
signatureLines.context: 解释自己其实不是普通FBI

signatureLines.text: I just want you to know that I can still take you in. I have a badge.
signatureLines.context: 对量子世界老大的执拗

personalityProfile.core: 呆萌执法者 + 家庭为重
personalityProfile.belief: 不管什么身份，家庭永远是第一位
